title: Uninstall Fish Fin Voice
description: Zatrzymuje procesy Electron/Node i usuwa folder aplikacji z Pinokio.

params.message: powershell -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -Command "$app=(Get-Location).Path; taskkill /F /IM electron.exe /T 2>$null; taskkill /F /IM node.exe /T 2>$null; Set-Location ..; Remove-Item -LiteralPath $app -Recurse -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue"
